price: Am Tag, da sie gewaltsam zum Feuer der Hölle gestoßen werden:
arabic: يَوۡمَ يُدَعُّونَ إِلَىٰ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ دَعًّا

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: yawma yudaʿʿūna ilā nāri jahannama daʿʿan
